---
title: "mech-interp-tinkering"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, description]
---

Informal notes from tinkering with the internals of language models. These are
musings and small experiments — some pan out, most don't, and I write up the
interesting ones (including the ones that didn't work). Not peer-reviewed, not
exhaustive. If something here ever turns into a real result, it'll get its own
repo and I'll link it.
